findings.location: Source: introductory note before UserAgentParserの設定サンプル section
findings.description: The note stating that the patterns shown do not cover all use cases, and that projects should carefully consider which patterns they actually need, is entirely omitted.
findings.source_evidence: 「以下に示すパターンは各利用ケースにおける全てのパターンを網羅しているわけではない。利用プロジェクトにて実際に利用するパターンを十分に検討すること。」

findings.description: The source has 2 headings — the document title 'UserAgent情報取得機能設定サンプル' and the h2 section 'UserAgentParserの設定サンプル' — but the knowledge file contains only 1 section (s1). The h2 heading 'UserAgentParserの設定サンプル' is not represented as a distinct section or heading.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST: title level with `---` + section level with `===` ('UserAgentParserの設定サンプル')

findings.description: Several property names used in the XML configuration are absent from hints: `osSetting` and `browserSetting` (top-level UserAgentParser properties), and `versionIndex` and `nameIndex` (ItemPattern capture-group index properties).
findings.source_evidence: Source XML uses: <property name="osSetting">, <property name="browserSetting">, <property name="versionIndex" value="2">, <property name="nameIndex" value="1">
